creator: jan.lentfer@web.de
text:
Edwin Groothuis wrote:
> Maintainer of net/lam7,
>
> Please note that PR ports/100392 has just been submitted.
>
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
>
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>     http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/100392
>
>   


Hi Edwin,

I am sorry to say that I do not have time to maintain this port anymore 
- I myself do not you this piece of software anymore, especially since 
it has been replaced (more or less) by OpenMPI. Thus, I'd ask you to 
remove me as a Maintainer of this port. I am really sorry about this 
since this was the only thing that I could give back to The FreeBSD 
community but my current profession and family situation doesn't leave 
me enough time to fulfill this anymore. But I hope to be back sometime :-)

Thanks a lot


Jan
